legal.kvkk_html:
Data Controller

Pursuant to Turkish Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK"), your personal data is processed by Şafakarı İnşaat as data controller.

Personal Data Processed

We process your name, phone number, e-mail address and message content submitted via contact forms or WhatsApp.

Purpose of Processing

  • Responding to your inquiries and managing customer relations
  • Providing information about our residence and villa projects
  • Fulfilling legal obligations

Transfer of Personal Data

Your personal data may only be shared with authorized public authorities in accordance with Articles 8 and 9 of KVKK and only when legally required.

Your Rights under KVKK Article 11

  • Learn whether your personal data is processed
  • Request information about the processing of your data
  • Learn the purpose of processing and whether it is used accordingly
  • Request correction of incomplete or incorrect data
  • Request erasure or destruction of your data under the conditions of Article 7
  • Request notification of these actions to third parties to whom your data has been transferred
  • Request compensation for damages

How to Apply

To exercise these rights, please apply in writing to info@safakari.com.

⚠️ Note: This text is a template and should be reviewed by a legal advisor.
legal.cerez_html:
What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files placed on your browser by the websites you visit. They help recognize you on subsequent visits and improve your experience.

Cookies We Use

  • Essential cookies: Required for core site functionality (preference memory, etc.).
  • Analytics cookies: Used via Google Analytics to anonymously analyze site usage. Activated only with your consent.

Managing Cookies

You can update your preference from the cookie banner at the bottom or delete cookies via your browser settings.

Contact

For questions about cookies, please write to info@safakari.com.

⚠️ Note: This text is a template and should be reviewed by a legal advisor.

loan.title: 💰 Mortgage Calculator
loan.subtitle: Instantly calculate the monthly installment, total payment and interest for your prospective home. Information is for guidance only.
loan.field_price_hint: Total price of the residence you wish to buy
loan.field_term_hint: Number of months to repay (e.g. 120 months = 10 years)
loan.rate_hint_monthly: In Türkiye, monthly mortgage rates are typically around 3-4%
loan.disclaimer: This calculation is for informational purposes only. Please contact your bank for current rates and an official offer.

loan.err_down: Down payment must be less than the property price.
loan.err_term: Term must be at least 1 month.
